titleInfo.title: Eminence and Fame: A Note on the Context of Buddhist Sculpture from Qingzhou and the Tai shan area

mods.abstract: p. 62-63: Whitfield discusses Mount Tai and the Diamond Sutra carving as background information for the Qingzhou-finds. He suggests a connection with "the activities of Zhu Senglang’s followers in the fifth century," because "its strongly archaic clerical-regular style may be a more ancient relic than the other rock inscriptions" in Shandong (p. 63).

titleInfo.title: Compassion and Fascination 寶相莊嚴
